controlSet.description: Binding decisions require stronger legitimacy controls than advisory outputs.
Revocation must be available at execution-relevant speed.
A consequential system must expose a contestability path.

failureModes: Binding decisions proceed without effective revocation
Contestability is absent for consequential actions
Audit references are unavailable for high-risk operation
decisionPolicy: Systems with high legitimacy gap scores SHOULD be blocked or escalated before consequential action.
